name: THE LOST ORC:
text: Hi! Are u better now does your head hurt from the fall into the abbys that we are in

name: Player:
text: Ahhhh what are u talking about ...? i dont even know where i am or why i am here , where is my village ??

text: You were the great epison warrior who fought against arestos but lost and he sent you to the underworld(the abbyes)

text: GO! go find your old  powers and kill arestos to unite everyone and make us one big world !!
